name: ceo-find-idea
title: CEO find-opportunity (business-form-aware, skeleton)
description: CEO-side deliverable of the multi-model monetization parent: a find-opportunity skill SKELETON — business-form awareness (not product-locked; pick one, don't agonize early) + the general find-a-real-opportunity discipline (don't fabricate; dispatch a research Goal to researcher for real signal first; produce 2-3 distinct candidates; hand each to decide-direction). Per-form concrete methods are left as placeholders, deferred to dedicated research tasks (parent layer ②). Plain language, no jargon. Zero .py change.
